summary: A clip from a Fox News segment with an America's Newsroom label. It shows a split screen of a studio anchor and a woman interviewed via video link, with a lower-third reading ANGEL MOM DEMANDS ACCOUNTABILITY FROM FAIRFAX D.A. The segment then shows the woman alongside inset photographs of a man and of two women together, with a caption identifying her as a victim's mother and a lower-third reading MULLIN: VIRGINIA IS "A MAGNET FOR CRIMINAL ALIENS".

script.scene: A split screen shows a studio anchor and a woman on a video link; lower-third reads ANGEL MOM DEMANDS ACCOUNTABILITY FROM FAIRFAX D.A.
The woman appears alongside inset photos of a man and of two women; caption identifies her as a victim's mother.
Lower-third reads MULLIN: VIRGINIA IS A MAGNET FOR CRIMINAL ALIENS as she continues speaking.

notable_text: FOX NEWS; AMERICA'S NEWSROOM; ANGEL MOM DEMANDS ACCOUNTABILITY FROM FAIRFAX D.A.; MULLIN: VIRGINIA IS "A MAGNET FOR CRIMINAL ALIENS"
